games.name: Mystery Pic
games.description:
Welcome to Mystery Pic, the intriguing puzzle game designed to challenge your observational skills! Your main objective is to decipher the identity of the blurry image displayed on your screen. Due to a humorous narrative involving a head injury, your view is obscured, adding an extra layer of excitement and difficulty to the game.

You will navigate through 150 captivating levels filled with mind-boggling images that will put your guessing abilities to the test. Each image presents a unique challenge, inviting you to think outside the box as you attempt to figure out what you are seeing. The vibrant graphics and engaging gameplay create a mesmerizing experience that keeps you immersed for hours.

Should you find yourself in a tight spot, don t fret! Mystery Pic offers an in-game currency system where you can use your earned coins to purchase helpful hints. These hints can assist in revealing a crucial part of the image or providing a clue, ensuring that you ll never be stuck for too long. Get ready for a journey filled with fun and mind-bending challenges!

How to play free Mystery Pic game online

To play Mystery Pic, begin by selecting a level. You will see a blurred image before you; your task is to identify it. Type in your guesses below the image. If you are unsure, use your coins to buy hints for extra help. Keep playing and unlock new levels!
games.instructions: Touch or mouse to play

games.name: Pixelkenstein Halloweens

Each candy you collect contributes to your score, and reaching the highest score possible is key to mastering the game. The more candies you gather, the closer you get to unlocking new stages and surprises that await you at every turn. It s a thrilling game of skill, focus, and strategy set against a vibrant Halloween backdrop.

Perfect for players of all ages, Pixelkenstein Halloweens offers a blend of fun and challenge that will keep you entertained for hours. With engaging gameplay and charming graphics, it s the perfect game to enjoy solo or with friends this Halloween season. So, gear up, grab your virtual trick-or-treat bag, and dive into the sweet world of candy collecting!

To play the Pixelkenstein Halloweens game, simply use your keyboard or touch controls to navigate your character around the screen. Your objective is to move swiftly and collect the candy as it appears while avoiding obstacles. The more candies you gather, the higher your score will be!

How to play free RiddleMath game online

To play RiddleMath, simply log into the game and choose your desired level. Each level presents a series of math riddles, each requiring logical reasoning and problem-solving skills to solve. Use your mouse or keyboard to input your answers and progress through the levels. Enjoy the challenge!
games.instructions: For Pc - Use your mouse to click on any of the available numbers Once selected click on an empty spot in the puzzle to place the number there For Mobile - Drag the number from the available list and drop it into the empty space

games.name: Carnot Game   Casual Physics
games.description: Carnot Game Description Carnot Game is an interactive game based on the Carnot Cycle, where the player must alternate between three thermal sources (hot, insulator, and cold) to maximize the work done on the piston of a cylinder. The goal is to keep the piston operating in the ideal Carnot cycle, making the transitions between sources at the right time to avoid the cylinder exploding or freezing. The closer the player is to the Carnot cycle, the higher their score and progress.
games.instructions: The player must click the button to switch between the thermal sources of the system remembering to make the transitions at the right moments to avoid the piston jamming or the cylinder exploding The Carnot cycle consists of four thermodynamic processes
